details: The agent navigated to https://github.com/facebook/react/issues, captured a snapshot, and correctly extracted the data. The total of 810 open issues is confirmed in the snapshot (uid=4_66 shows 'Open (810)' and uid=4_38 shows 'Issues 810'). The 5 most recent issue titles are accurately reported from the snapshot data matching issues #36137, #36128, #36124, #36122, and #36120.
